chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.27 of 2006 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of M.A. No.570/2006 3. For hearing of M.A. No.571/2006 --------------------------------------------- 11.03.2026 Mr. Muhammad Khosa, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------------- Applicants are accused in Complaint No.19/2002 and they have impugned the order dated 24.01.2006, passed by learned Presiding Officer, Bank Court-II, Karachi, whereby their application under Section 265-K, Cr.PC was dismissed. Instant criminal miscellaneous application is pending since 16.02.2006, without any progress. Today, Mr. Muhammad Khosa, counsel for applicant, once again seeks time for preparation. Applicants seek premature acquittal in a complaint case. Counsel for applicant is unaware about pendency of aforesaid Complaint before learned trial Court, which reflects that applicants and their counsel have lost their interest in pursuing this case. Therefore, instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed along with all the pending applications. However, if the case is still pending they may repeat the same application before learned trial Court on fresh grounds. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
